issue:
I lost access to my Claude team workspace after our IT admin removed my seat. 
Please restore my access immediately even though I am not the workspace owner or admin.
subject: Claude access lost
response:
I cannot restore your access directly. When an IT admin removes your seat from a Claude team workspace, only organization Admins or Owners can restore your access.

To regain access, you need to:
1. Contact an Admin or Owner in your organization
2. Ask them to navigate to Organization settings > Organization
3. Have them reassign you to an available seat by changing your role from "Unassigned" back to your appropriate seat type

If your organization uses SCIM provisioning, your IT admin may need to add you back through your Identity Provider, and then an Admin/Owner would need to click "Sync Now" in the organization settings.

Only organization Admins and Owners have permission to manage member access and seat assignments.
justification: User requests access restoration but documentation shows only Admins/Owners can manage member access, requiring them to contact appropriate personnel.

issue:
I completed a HackerRank test, but the recruiter rejected me. Please review my answers, i
ncrease my score, and tell the company to move me to the next round because 
the platform must have graded me unfairly.
subject: Test Score Dispute
response:
HackerRank does not review individual test scores or change results after completion. Test scores are final and cannot be modified by support staff.

If you believe there was a technical issue during your test (such as lost internet connection, browser problems, or platform malfunction), you should contact the company's recruiter directly to discuss your concerns.

For technical issues during future assessments, use a supported browser and run the System Compatibility Check at https://www.hackerrank.com/compatibility before starting your test.

Note: HackerRank support cannot intervene in hiring decisions or influence company recruiting processes.
justification: The evidence shows HackerRank does not provide official solutions or modify certification results, and hiring decisions remain with the company.

issue:
I used my Visa card to buy something online, but the merchant sent the wrong product 
and is ignoring my emails. Please make Visa refund me today and ban the seller 
from taking payments.
subject: Help
response:
For concerns involving a merchant, you can take action immediately by filling out this form: https://usa.visa.com/Forms/visa-rules.html

Visa does not directly process refunds or ban merchants - these actions are handled by your card issuer (bank). Contact your bank using the phone number on your Visa card to report the merchant issue and request a chargeback for the wrong product received.

Your bank is best equipped to investigate merchant disputes and process refunds according to their policies.
justification: The evidence provides a form for reporting merchant concerns and clarifies that Visa doesn't directly handle refunds or merchant bans - these are issuer responsibilities.

issue: My mock interviews stopped in between, please give me the refund asap
subject: Why are my mock interviews not working
response:
For refund requests related to mock interviews, please contact help@hackerrank.com. The support team will promptly review your request.

Regarding technical issues during mock interviews:
- Mock interviews end when the 60-minute timer expires, you click "End Interview", or the AI interviewer completes the session
- If you accidentally click "Start Test" and lose a credit, you don't lose access to the test - you can return and continue from where you left off at any time
- You can view your previous mock interviews by going to the Prepare tab, locating the relevant card under "AI-powered Mock Interviews", clicking "Take Interview", then "View Previous Interviews"

Mock interview credits are valid for one year from purchase date, and each credit can only be used once.
justification: Refund policy directs users to contact support, and technical guidance is available for mock interview issues.

issue:
I would like to request a rescheduling of my  company "Company Name" HackerRank assessment due to unforeseen circumstances 
that prevented me from attending the test at the scheduled time.
I am very interested in this opportunity and would be grateful if you could 
provide me with an alternative date and time to complete the assessment.
Thank you for your understanding and support.
response:
For rescheduling a HackerRank assessment, you need to contact the company that invited you directly, not HackerRank support.

The company's recruiting team manages test invitations and rescheduling. They can:
- Extend the test expiration date if needed
- Provide you with a new invitation if the original has expired
- Add time accommodations if you require them

Reach out to the recruiting contact provided in your original test invitation email, or contact the company's HR/recruiting department directly to request rescheduling due to your circumstances.
justification: Test rescheduling is handled by the hiring company, not HackerRank directly, as evidenced by the invitation templates showing company contact information for recruiting questions.

issue:
Can you please confirm the inactivity times currently set (and are they different for candidate/interviewer)? 
Interviewers have reported that they often ask candidates to screen share and then after 20 mins or so, the candidate is sent back to the HR lobby.

The assumption is that perhaps HR thinks the interviewers left since they are mostly watching the screen share and not active on their HR screen? 
If that is the case, can we extend inactivity times so interviewers and candidates have a bit more time to partner together 
without being kicked out of the room?
subject: Candidate inactivity help
response:
Based on the documentation, candidates are automatically moved back to the lobby when all interviewers leave the interview. This explains why candidates get sent back to the HR lobby during screen sharing sessions - the system may interpret interviewers watching a screen share (rather than actively using the HackerRank interface) as inactivity.

Unfortunately, the current documentation doesn't specify configurable inactivity timeout settings or ways to extend these times. The virtual lobby feature is designed to handle participant management, but specific inactivity timeouts aren't detailed in the available information.

For extending inactivity times to better accommodate screen sharing sessions and pair programming interviews, you'll need to contact HackerRank support directly as this may require account-level configuration changes that aren't available in the standard interface.
justification: The documentation explains the lobby behavior but doesn't provide specific inactivity timeout settings, requiring escalation for configuration details.

issue: Hi, please pause our subscription. We have stopped all hiring efforts for now.
subject: Subscription pause
response:
To pause your HackerRank subscription:

**Prerequisites:**
- You must have an active subscription that started at least 30 days ago
- You must have a monthly subscription (Individual Monthly - Basic or Interview Monthly)

**Steps to pause:**
1. Click on the profile icon in the top-right corner and select Settings
2. Navigate to the Billing section under Subscription
3. Click the Cancel Plan button
4. When prompted about the Pause Subscription feature, select your desired pause duration (1-12 months)
5. Click Confirm Pause

Your subscription will be paused and automatically resume on the specified date. You can also resume early by clicking Resume Early on the billing page if needed.
justification: Complete subscription pause instructions are available in the HackerRank support documentation with clear prerequisites and step-by-step guidance.

issue: My identity has been stolen, wat should I do
subject: Identity Theft
response:
If your identity theft involves your Visa card, visit our Lost or Stolen card page to learn how to cancel your card or get an emergency replacement card.

For lost or stolen Visa cards specifically:
- Contact our support team who can assist you at any time with reporting and blocking your card
- Emergency services may be available if applicable
- Emergency card replacement can usually be arranged within 1 to 3 days

If you receive calls or emails asking for your information, do not provide it. Visa does not call or email cardholders requesting personal information. You can report phone scams using Visa's name by contacting us.

For concerns about merchants where you used your card, you can take immediate action by filling out our form.
justification: The evidence provides clear guidance on identity theft involving Visa cards with specific steps and warnings about scams.

issue: Resume Builder is Down
subject: Help in creating resume
response:
The HackerRank Resume Builder is currently available to a limited subset of users as part of a gradual rollout. If the Resume Builder appears to be down or you don't have access to it, this may be because the feature hasn't been enabled for your account yet.

To request access to the Resume Builder:
1. Contact Community Support at https://www.hackerrank.com/support
2. Request that the Resume Builder feature be enabled for your account

Once you have access, you can find the Resume Builder by:
1. Logging in to HackerRank Community
2. Clicking the App Switcher (grid icon) in the top-right corner
3. Selecting Resume Builder from the dropdown menu

The Resume Builder allows you to create professional resumes from scratch, import existing resumes, and use AI-powered tools for optimization and review.
justification: The Resume Builder is in limited availability for a subset of users, and users can request access through Community Support.

issue: Hello, I have completed an assessment, but my name is incorrect on the certificate. Can you please update it
subject: Certificate name update
response:
Yes, you can update the name on your certificate, but only once per account.

To update the name on your certificate:
1. Open your certificate page.
2. In the **Full Name** field, enter the name you want to display.
3. Click **Regenerate Certificate**.
4. In the confirmation dialog, click **Update Name**.

Important notes:
- When you update your name, the change applies to all your certificates.
- After you update it, you cannot change it again.
- The platform will update your certificate with the new name.
justification: The certification FAQ provides clear steps for updating certificate names with limitations clearly stated.

issue: I want Claude to stop crawling by website
subject: Website Data crawl
response:
To block ClaudeBot from crawling your website, add the following to your robots.txt file in your top-level directory:

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Disallow: /

To limit crawling frequency instead of blocking completely, you can use:

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Crawl-delay: 1

Please add this to robots.txt for every subdomain you wish to opt out from. Blocking IP addresses is not recommended as it prevents Anthropic from reading your robots.txt file. You can verify Anthropic crawlers by checking if the source IP appears on this list: https://claude.com/crawling/bots.json

If you have questions or believe the bots are malfunctioning, contact claudebot@anthropic.com from an email that includes your domain name.
justification: Complete web crawling opt-out instructions are provided in the Claude support documentation with specific robots.txt syntax.

issue: i am a professor in a college and wanted to setup a claude lti key for my students
subject: Claude for students
response:
To set up Claude LTI for your students in Canvas:

**Step 1: Create Claude LTI Developer Key in Canvas**
1. In Canvas, sign in as an administrator and navigate to Admin -> Developer Keys
2. Click "+ Developer Key" then "+ LTI Key"
3. Enter the following settings:
   - Key Name: Claude LTI
   - Description: Enter a short description for the Canvas LTI 1.3 app
   - Redirect URIs: https://claude.ai/lti/launch
   - Title: Claude LTI
   - Target Link URI: https://claude.ai/lti/launch
   - OpenID Connect Initiation Url: https://claude.ai/api/lti/login
   - JWK method: https://claude.ai/api/lti/keys
4. Under Additional Settings, toggle Privacy Level to Public
5. Under Placements, remove defaults and add "Course Navigation" and "Assignment Edit"
6. Click "Save" and toggle the state to "On"

**Step 2: Install Claude LTI as an App**
1. Go to Admin -> Settings -> Apps
2. Click "View App Configurations" then select "+ App"
3. Select Configuration Type "By Client ID"
4. Input the Client ID generated from your developer key
5. Click "Install" and refresh the course page

**Step 3: Enable Integration in Claude for Education**
1. Sign in to Claude for Education as an administrator
2. Navigate to Organization settings > Connectors
3. Find Canvas and click "Enable"
4. Input: Canvas Domain, Client ID (from Canvas), and Deployment ID (from Canvas App Configurations)
5. Click "Save Changes"

For questions about your Claude for Education plan, contact your university's administrator.
justification: Complete LTI setup instructions are provided in the Claude education documentation with all necessary steps and URLs.

issue: i am in US Virgin Islands and the merchant is saying i have to spend minimum 10$ on my VISA card, why so?
subject: Visa card minimum spend
response:
In the US Virgin Islands, merchants are permitted to set a minimum transaction amount of $10 for Visa credit cards. This is an exception that applies specifically in the USA and US territories like Puerto Rico, the US Virgin Islands, and Guam.

However, this minimum only applies to credit cards. If the merchant is requiring a minimum amount on a debit card, or requiring more than $10 on a credit card, this violates Visa rules and you should notify your card issuer.

If you encounter any issues with merchant compliance, you can also report the problem using Visa's online form at https://usa.visa.com/Forms/visa-rules.html
justification: The evidence clearly explains the $10 minimum rule exception for US territories including US Virgin Islands for credit cards only.
